entry.title: Failed work orders / Why have maintenance plans stopped generating work orders?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Masters,
I recently noticed that some maintenance plans had stopped generating work orders, even though they were being generated correctly until last year: why is this happening?

When I analysed this in detail, I even noticed that two maintenance plans
> created in exactly the same way, on the same day, with only a 30-day difference in the issuance of work orders.
... only maintenance plan ‘A’ was still generating its work orders, whilst ‘B’ had stopped

How is this possible??

Or, what should I check in the completed work orders?

Or in the maintenance plans?? Although, as I said: they are identical!

Thank you for your help in resolving this issue 🙂

entry.title: Re: Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud for on-premise developments
entry.content:
Hello @OlgaDolinskaja 

I am following the guide to trigger an ATC Check Run via REST API:
https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/executing-abap-test-cockpit-atc-check-runs?locale=en-US

I would like to filter the scope of the run by Transport Request, Object, or Package when using an objectProvider (remote RCF destination). However, whenever I include an osl:objectSet in the request body, I get the following error:

"Object Collection via Object Set Layer (OSL) not supported – RCF-Destination: XXXXX"

Is it possible to filter the object scope when using a remote objectProvider via the REST API? 

Thank you!


Thanks and regards,

Gerardo.

entry.title: Re: Not able to install Desktop Agent - Integrity Issue
entry.content:
follow these instruction:Registry key to add before launching Agent installation process

Computer\HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Desktop Agent

 

Key : Chk_MT (String type)

Value : false

 

Please follow this process

  • Uninstall manually the Agent (if still there)
  • Add the key Chk_MT inside the registry
  • Launch the installation of your Agent as “per machine” (installation choice only available by launching the .exe with admin rights)

entry.title: Internal Error - Inventory Transfer
entry.content:
Dear Team,

While adding an inventory transfer for a specific batch, the system is showing an error as Internal Error.

The following checks have already been performed:

  1. Transaction notification has been turned off from General Settings.
  2. All add-ons have been disconnected and tested.

Despite these checks, the issue persists.

entry.title: Re: Is there a combined list of missing parts for Production and Planned Orders?
entry.content: Hi, did you ever find a standard SAP way to report missing parts for production orders and planned orders together in a single list? We are facing the same situation: we can run the collective availability check for both together, but then we still have to review shortages separately in CO24 and MDVP. If you found any solution, standard report, Fiori app, or SAP note related to this, I’d really appreciate it. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Tools Update – First Release of the SAP Fiori MCP Server for Agentic AI Workflows
entry.content:
@Christoph_Gollmick

Hi Christoph thanks a lot for nice blog. I'm trying to get this installed in VS Code by command: npm install -g @sap-ux/fiori-mcp-server but I'm getting this error:

 

It looks like problem related to sharp-libvips.

I tried to npm set strict-ssl false,  NPM install sharp, also tried to export company root certificate from Edge to
 setx NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS "C:\certs\company-root.cer" and then setx NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS "C:\certs\company-root.cer", also cleaning NPM cache by deleting NPM cache by "npm cache clean --force" however still can't make this running. I'm working on node v24.12.0, npm 11.6.2. Please could you help me.

entry.title: Re: Performance Optimization in SAP Composable Storefront

entry.title: Re: ABAP Developer Challenge - Joule for Developers using Basic Trial
entry.content: Package Name: ZAC_148789

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP BW with SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @swati_gawade 

your blog reflects the current state quite well. However, I think you missed 2 things:

1) Extended maintenance until end of 2030 is available also if you are not on private Cloud, see: https://me.sap.com/notes/1648480 

2) What you, and SAP as well is always missing, is the second most important topic after BW modernization: Front-End modernization or Front-End transition. It is right, you can lift & shift your BW, but one day you will have to change the data source of all your ~500 to 1000 BW queries to Analytic Models ... and exchange it in your ~100 SAC stories.

I think this is the biggest pain point and most relevant reason why many customers are still reluctant. Many customers are trying to postpone this as far as possible, due to the never-ending crisis we are facing today.

Maybe you want to include the front-end topic into your paths as well?

BR, Martin

Ojeswini

entry.title: How to Avoide production confirmation consume stock in wrong SLoc
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts

Our company have 2 different SLoc for the materials, one for Storage Warehouse, one for Production SLoc in the plant

When our production operators confirm the production order, they sometimes consume the stock in Storage SLoc, when there is not enough inventory in the production SLoc. 

Can someone advice a solution to avoide production operators to consume the stock from wrong SLoc ?

entry.title: New POD 2.0 Framework: POD Notifications
entry.content:
This blog post is part of a series on SAP Digital Manufacturing new POD 2.0 framework, the new generation of SAP Digital Manufacturing worker UIs.

New POD 2.0 Framework

  1. The New Generation of SAP Digital Manufacturing Worker UIs
  2. Template-Based Design Instead of POD Types
  3. Visual WYSIWYG Designer
  4. POD 2.0 Hands-on, Flexible Layout Capabilities, Part 1
  5. POD 2.0 Hands-on, Flexible Layout Capabilities, Part 2
  6. Custom UI Dialogs and Calling Production Processes
  7. Dynamic PODs, How to Dynamically Show, Hide, Enable, and Disable UI Elements
  8. Other Business Capabilities Enabled by POD 2.0
  9. Interactive Value Journey (IVJ)
  10. POD Notifications

🗓️ Timeline

POD 2.0 is currently in BETA with selected customers, General Availability (GA) is planned for 2605 release. BETA content is subject to change!

POD Notifications

POD Notifications in SAP Digital Manufacturing (SAP DM) are real-time alerts and messages delivered directly to operators working on Production Operator Dashboards (PODs). They provide instant communication about production events, quality issues, equipment status changes, and other critical manufacturing updates that require operator attention or action.

Legacy Setup

In POD 1.0, POD Notifications needed to be manually and individually enabled in POD Designer.

POD 2.0 Setup

In POD 2.0, enabling individual POD Notifications is no longer required, and 2.0 PODs are always connected and 'listening'.

To setup POD Notifications in POD 2.0, first you need to create a production process and ideally define minimum parameters so notifications can be dynamic.

Select 'Start' and 'Input Parameters' to create some input parameters.

Then, select 'POD Connection', 'POD Version' as '2.0', and map the input parameters.

Next, add a 'POD Message' control, and configure it accordingly by enabling/disabling 'Require Confirmation' and entering a 'Message', which can use any available parameters.

That´s it! Save it, deploy it and run it by entering any input parameters created.

If 'Require Confirmation' is checked, you must get a notification that requires a confirmation like the one below.

If 'Require Confirmation' is unchecked, you must get a regular toast notification like the one below.

 

Have you tried POD 2.0 Notifications? Let me know!

Stay tuned for more! Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: What is a Fleet Management System (FMS)?
entry.content: An FMS monitors vehicle health, driver behavior, fuel usage, and real-time tracking. Taabi provides advanced fuel tracking and vehicle monitoring for fleets.

entry.title: Customer Hierarchy - Release Partner In Contract
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have created the customer hierarchy as per business requirement.

I have created a Quantity Contract for the parent and as per business requirement we should be able to assign ONLY the Child in Contract Header-->Partner-->Release Partner.

System should not allow other AG or AA customers absent in Hierarchy node.

We are on RISE 2023 Private Cloud.

Please can someone let me know whether this is possible, if so how. Please find attached the screenshots for your ready reference.

Thanks and Regards.

Saurav Mallick

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi, I'm Giacomo and I live in the north of Germany, in Bremen. I'm Italian from the region of Abruzzo. After completing my studies in Pisa (Informatik and Mathematics), I moved to Germany for my PhD and stayed after that. I've been here for 16 years.

entry.title: Sap Commerce Hac extension not working after 2211 jdk 21 upgrade
entry.content:
Hi,

Last year our customer's project team built an SAP Commerce Administration Console (Hac) extension based on this guide https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/9b5366ff6eb34df5be29881ff55f97d2/df4994dfb4464ede8ffe61366c9cff5b.html?locale=en-US  to flush cache cluster-wide.

This extension enables a new tab:

[
  {
    "basePath": "/cluster",
    "mainTabLabel": "Cluster",
    "subTabs": [
      {
        "path": "/monitoring/",
        "label": "Cache Monitoring",
        "skipPrefix": false
      }
    ]
  }
]

After we upgraded our custom code to version 2211 jdk 21 I now receive Error 404 when accessing the tab:

https://localhost:9002/hac/cluster/monitoring/

DEBUG [hybrisHTTP9] [FilterChainProxy] Secured GET /cluster/monitoring/
DEBUG [hybrisHTTP9] [FilterChainProxy] Secured GET /cluster/monitoring/
DEBUG [hybrisHTTP9] [DispatcherServlet] GET "/hac/cluster/monitoring/", parameters={}
DEBUG [hybrisHTTP9] [DispatcherServlet] GET "/hac/cluster/monitoring/", parameters={}
DEBUG [hybrisHTTP9] [DispatcherServlet] Completed 404 NOT_FOUND
DEBUG [hybrisHTTP9] [DispatcherServlet] Completed 404 NOT_FOUND

 

Our controller is built like this:

package de.hybris.platform.hac.controller;


import de.hybris.platform.core.model.user.UserModel;
import de.hybris.platform.hac.facade.HacCacheFacade;
import de.hybris.platform.hac.facade.HacClusterFacade;
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.user.UserService;
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandles;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collection;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import jakarta.annotation.Resource;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Controller;
import org.springframework.ui.Model;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ModelAttribute;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMethod;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseBody;


@Controller()
public class ClusterViewController extends ClusterHacController {

  private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(MethodHandles.lookup().lookupClass());

  private static final String VIEW_BASE = "monitoring/cluster/";
  private static final String nodeGroupAll = "all";
  private final HacClusterFacade clusterFacade;
  private final HacCacheFacade cacheFacade;
  @Value("${hac.extlinks.wiki.cluster}")
  private String wikiCluster;
 

  @Autowired
  public ClusterViewController(final HacClusterFacade clusterFacade,
      HacCacheFacade cacheFacade) {
    this.clusterFacade = clusterFacade;
    this.cacheFacade = cacheFacade;
  }

  @RequestMapping(value = "/cluster/monitoring")
  public String cluster(final Model model) {
    model.addAttribute("wikiCluster", wikiCluster);
    model.addAttribute("regions", cacheFacade.getCacheRegions());
    return "clusterview";
  }

[...]


}

We do not receive any warning and the extension is correctly added to localextensions.xml. Is there anything I can check on the spring configuration? 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to verify email delivery for invoices in S/4HANA...
entry.content:
The Monitoring Email Transmissions app shows "OK" when the message was successfully handed over to the configured mail server (SMTP).  It does not confirm that the recipient’s mailbox exists, nor that the email was actually delivered or opened.  If the recipient’s address is invalid, the mail server may still accept the message and only later generate a bounce notification. That bounce is not reflected back into the S/4HANA Cloud monitoring app.

In order to handle the bounced mails, as you might be knowing, the bounce message will typically be sent back to the sender’s email address (or a designated return-path address configured in your mail server). To monitor these, you need to check your mail server logs or configure bounce-handling in your email infrastructure (e.g., Microsoft Exchange, SAP Business Technology Platform mail service, or another SMTP provider). Few clients set up dedicated mailboxes to collect bounce notifications and then integrate that information back into SAP (via custom development or middleware).

entry.title: Re: Stop system-wide outgoing email notifications
entry.content: Hi @dawid90 Thanks for the details. I have seen this way of updating the Receiver Domains For Email Outbound but unfortunately it is not system specific which means what ever changes we do in test system will get flowed to Production system when the respective BCP is exported. So, this way is not suitable for our requirement. Also, I'm exploring by changing the default email sender address because it is system specific. I maintained some dummy address and testing it. If it works, we can use this method whenever some testing is required where emails are not required to send. Thank you Vamsi

entry.title: Re: Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud for on-premise developments
entry.content:
@gerardo_martingozalo 

This means that the checked system (on the other end of the RFC destination) does not support object sets via OSL because its release is too low. The ATC supports OSL-based object sets only starting from SAP_BASIS release 7.57.

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN
entry.content:
Can you give an example ?

As per the current process, after an asset transfer is performed, the old asset will continue to run depreciation for the current year. Depreciation will not be posted on the new asset during the same year.

Starting from the next fiscal year, depreciation will stop on the old asset and will begin on the new asset.

entry.title: Re: Week 3 : Use RAP Business Logic Prediction to Implement Validation
entry.content: Package: ZAC_880096

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN
entry.content: the entry of transfer CR old Asset , Dr Depreciation old asset , and Dr New Asset , CR Accumulated depreciation, while user wants to Dr the new asset as aquisition with the net

BADI is changing the value correctly but change is not visible in UI only after full refresh or change of some standard field. I tried to enhance ODATA with sideeffects but it looks like it has no effect.

entry.title: Cannot subscribe to Cloud Identity Service
entry.content:
I tried to subscribe to the Cloud Identity Service in multiple SAP BTP subaccounts, but none of them worked. I also tried using a new email to create a new BTP trial account, but I still couldn’t subscribe to Cloud Identity. I attempted to delete and subscribe again, but that didn’t work either. Switching between the TEST and PRODUCTIVE parameters also had no effect.

I checked the entitlements, and Cloud Identity is included. Also tried remove the entitlement and add it again, result still the same

Has anyone faced a similar issue? Please help me with this.

entry.title: Custom fields for Purchase Order - Not updating in Fiori
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are on S/4HANA 2023 SP01 on premise system. Currently we are implementing requested extension of Purchase Order Item by our biznis. 
Requested change is pretty straightforward: Add two custom fields to Purchase Order Item. One character like and second one date. When first field is filled automatically fill second field with current date. This should work for ME21N transaction as well as for Fiori F0842A Manage Purchase Orders.

I was able to sucessfully add two custom fields to the object via Custom Fields and Logic Fiori application to the ME21N and also to the F0842A Manage Purchase Orders item view (using Key User Extensibility).

I was also able to define logic to fill new custom date field when custom character field is filled. I have used BADI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM for this which is working nicely for ME21N. 

Issue is that when custom character field is changed in Fiori application F0842A, BADI is called and content on custom field on backend gets changed but change is not propagated to the frontend. There is no entity refresh done. User therefore does not see that the second custom field is filled. If the user does some change on standard PO item field the full entity refresh is done and second custom filled is filled only then. This would cause lot of confusion and we dont want to force user to edit standard fields just to see changes in custom fields.

I tried to add annotation to the ODATA service  MM_PUR_PO_MAINT_V2_SRV that is ODATA service used by Fiori application to implement side effects to custom fields but I am not albe to make it work. 

I tried:

  • enhancing MPC_EXT Define method of service
  • adaptation project via VS Code adding local annotation file

 

Annotations Target="MM_PUR_PO_MAINT_V2_SRV.C_PurchaseOrderItemTPType">
    <Annotation Term="Common.v1.SideEffects" Qualifier="RekChanged">
        <Record>
            <PropertyValue Property="SourceProperties">
                <Collection>
                    <PropertyPath>XY_REK_ID_PDI</PropertyPath>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
            <PropertyValue Property="TargetProperties">
                <Collection>
                    <String>XY_REK_DATE_PDI</String>
                </Collection>
            </PropertyValue>
        </Record>
    </Annotation>
</Annotations>

Non of these helped. Second custom field is not refreshed when first one is. Is there some way how to force refresh of one custom field when other custom field is change when Custom fields are used for PO Item. 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP CAP Console: meet the product team to share new requirements
entry.content:
Hi CAP developers and users...
We are looking for CAP developers who have deployed and/or monitored CAP applications to give us feedback and provide requirements for the new SAP CAP Console, including AI-related features.
If you're interested to meet the CAP product team, please email me: ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com.
Looking forward to collaborating with you 🙂
Ravid and the CAP team.

entry.title: Re: Customer Projects Migration - Part 1: Migration of Fixed Price Projects and Time & Expense P
entry.content:
Hi @NikolaiE / @Anja_Flatau ,

Thanks for sharing the migration approach. I have a few questions regarding the Fixed Price migration approach shared earlier -

- Executing EBRR will generated balances in Accrued Revenue, Deferred Revenue and Revenue Adjustment GL Accounts. Will these balances not be brought over from the legacy environment via GL migration as well?

- While posting invoices to build deferred revenue, tax percentage has been considered as zero. The AR open items brought in via GL migration will be inclusive of tax. If the revenue posted via these invoices will also include tax amount then will it not result in incorrect deferred revenue postings? If the revenue will not include tax amounts, then how will the AR open items generated from these entries match the amount of the AR open items brought in via GL migration?

- Could you please share a detailed approach to migrate WIP for T&E projects?

Regards

Rohan Kir

entry.title: Re: Week 1 : Set up the Basic Trial account enabled with Joule for Developers
entry.content: Package created: ZAC_148789

entry.title: Re: New fixes and features in the Pipeline for Cloud Integration package with the Dec 2025 shipment
entry.content:
Hi Alex

I am posting this comment here because I could not find a more appropriate place. Today I noticed that the standard pipeline packages had been updated.

After updating them in my trial version, I encountered an issue in the package Cloud Integration Pipeline - Generic Inbound, specifically in the iFlow Pipeline v2 Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for IDoc.

It seems that the problem is in the Groovy function determinePartnerIDForIDocInbound. It looks like the variable Pid is missing a definition (for example, def Pid = null), since otherwise the script throws the following error:

java.lang.Exception: groovy.lang.MissingPropertyException: No such property: Pid for class: determinePartnerIDForIDocInbound__Script

Please check

Regards

This isn't a problem in Classic Design Experience. However, this mode is being discontinued by SAP.

What can I do?
Best Regards
Petra

entry.title: Automatic Removal of Dunning Level in Business Partner When No Open Items Exist
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

we are currently using a dunning procedure with 4 dunning levels in our system.

At the moment, the behavior is as follows:
When a customer reaches the highest dunning level (level 4), this level remains stored in the Business Partner master data. It is only reset (e.g., from level 4 back to level 1) when a new invoice is created and subsequently dunned again.

We would like to change this behavior.

If a customer has no open items left (i.e., all outstanding invoices have been fully paid), the dunning level should be automatically removed/reset in the Business Partner master data.

This should apply to all dunning levels, for example:

  • If a customer is on dunning level 4 and clears all open items → dunning level should be removed

  • If a customer is on dunning level 2 and clears all open items → dunning level should also be removed

Is there a standard functionality or configuration option in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that supports this requirement?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

Nathalie

entry.title: Re: Business Address Services (BAS)
entry.content: SAP links SOPR entries to ADR6 through the partner’s address number. RSCONN01 just sends what’s already queued, so the email trigger usually comes from your SD output setup, not the batch job.

entry.title: /hana-ai issue in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Hi Team

We are checking on the AI Tool Kit as part of the SAP BTP Build code for HANA Cloud, when we are using the /hana-ai agent to work on the forecast models, getting below issue, same issue for all the sample prompts. 

Please let us know if any other config needs to be done. 

Issue is: No database modules with .env found.

.env file is created in Database module and also bind the HDI key as well.  but same issue.

Thanks

Nag

entry.title: Road map for SAP .Net connector for .Net core 10
entry.content: The latest release of the SAP .NET Connector (version 3.1.7) continues to support .NET 8. We would like to understand SAP’s roadmap for supporting .NET 10, as our platform upgrade depends on the availability of .NET 10 compatibility in the SAP .NET Connector.

entry.title: Re: Event Mesh + AMQP: The Retry Trap Nobody Warns You About
entry.content:
My question is how can a message be resent again after the max number of retry is reached?

Let's say that there is a master data issue in the receiver system and this causes an error in the message delivery.  The retry count is 3 and the delay is 10 minutes.

Let's assume that the master data issue fixed after the retry count is reached ( after 30minutes ). So the message should be once again reprocessed to finally be delivered to the receiver system.

In option A, the message can be placed in DLQ JMS queue, if the maximum number of retry is reached. From that DLQ JMS queue it can be moved to the original JMS queue to be reprocessed for the 4th time.

But how can this be achieved in Option B? Because as far as I know the messages cannot be moved manually from a DLQ to the original processing queue.

Thanks.

entry.title: Upcoming Webinar | Turning Fair and Equitable Pay into Your Strategic Advantage
entry.content:
The clock is ticking. As EU member states finalize new requirements to align with the EU Pay Transparency Directive, now is the time to assess your current compensation and reporting practices. By taking a proactive approach, you can go beyond basic compliance and build a culture where everyone is motivated to perform at their best.

To help ensure you have the resources and support needed, we’re hosting a webinar on March 26th at 1 PM CET - EU Pay Transparency: Turning Fair and Equitable Pay into Your Strategic Advantage. Anita Lettink, a leading HR & Payroll advisor, and Bianka Woelke, Head of Application Product Management for SAP SuccessFactors, will share best practices for establishing fair, transparent compensation strategies that drive peak performance. Here’s a quick summary of what we’ll be covering:

  • The latest compensation and reporting requirements in the EU
  • How to build a strong foundation for pay equity with the right tools and insights
  • The evolving role of people managers as pay enters the spotlight

We look forward to seeing you there!

Register Here

entry.title: Re: Moving Average Price is not getting updated
entry.content:
Valuation category X means the material is managed with split valuation. This allows different valuation types (e.g., by origin, procurement type, or batch) to carry different prices. When you create a PO and GRN, the system updates the valuation type level, not the generic material master record. The material master price field you’re checking (in the general valuation view) will not change, because the system expects you to look at the valuation type-specific data.

To check the updated price, navigate to the Material Valuation app or the valuation data in the material master. Select the valuation type (e.g., "Imported," "Domestic," etc.) to see the updated moving average price or standard price. The generic material record will remain unchanged, since it’s only a header for the split valuation setup.

entry.title: Is there a process to automatically lock inactive users in SAP for Me?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud, and I understand that there is an application called Schedule Locks for unused Business Users app. This can be used to run a job to automatically run a job to lock inactive users in SAP S/4HANA. 

However, my question is if there is a similar approach which can be implemented to to run a job or process that can be used to automatically lock inactive users in SAP for Me?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Margin taxation in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Margin taxation is not natively supported in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Mostly it will be handled through external tax engines (like Vertex or Avalara) or custom configuration in the tax determination framework. The “best way” depends on whether you need compliance with EU margin schemes (e.g., travel services, second-hand goods) or local indirect tax rules.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: When I was a young developer I was working on a PLM system and we had an SAP integration. That's when I had my first contact with SAP.

entry.title: Replenishment Journey SAP Emarsys
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I was reviewing SAP Emarsys success stories and came across a very interesting use case in the pet care industry (I believe it was Zoomalia), where they implemented an AI-driven replenishment program.

The idea was to predict when a customer might run out of pet food and trigger personalized communications (email/SMS) at the right time to encourage re-purchase.

However, when I checked the available tactics and documentation, I couldn’t find a specific “replenishment” tactic or predefined journey for this scenario.

So I wanted to ask:

  • Has anyone implemented a similar replenishment use case in Emarsys?

  • Did you build it using Predict + Automation Center (e.g., purchase behavior + estimated consumption)?

Would love to hear your experiences or ideas!

Thanks in advance 🙌

entry.title: Re: Message type SHPCON for outbound delivery change whic...
entry.content:
The standard segment you are using (E1EDL18 with qualifier CHG) only updates header-level data. Batch split information, however, is maintained at the item level and requires different segments.

In order to meet your requirement, send the batch split information in E1EDL24 (for the sub-item) and E1EDL44 (for batch details). The parent item (main delivery item) remains in E1EDL18. Make sure the POSNR (item number) and UEPOS (higher-level item number) fields are set correctly so SAP knows the batch split belongs to the main item.

entry.title: Re: Moving Average Price is not getting updated
entry.content: Hello Team, I would like to inform you that we have not manually created any valuation type. Our materials are batch-enabled, so whenever we perform a GRN, the system automatically generates a batch. Correspondingly, the valuation type is created by the system and is equal to the batch number. Please let me know if any further clarifica

Our materials are batch-enabled, so whenever we perform a GRN, the system automatically generates a batch. Correspondingly, the valuation type is created by the system and is equal to the batch number. Please let me know if any fu

entry.title: Correspondence SAPV1 (Journal Voucher Vietnam)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working with the new correspondence SAPV1 (Journal Voucher Vietnam) in public clound and encountered an issue when trying to preview the form. When I open the preview, the system shows an error message

I suspect this is related to missing configuration in the Output Parameter Determination app.

I tried maintaining settings under:
Business Rules → Cash Journal Receipt, with Output Type: FI_CASH_JOURNAL_RECEIPT
but in the Determination Step: Form Template, the available setting table does not include the field Corr.Identifier (which I expected to use to assign the value SAPV1).

So far, I am not able to find where SAPV1 should be configured or which Output Type / Determination Step it belongs to.

Has anyone configured this new Vietnam correspondence before?

entry.title: Re: Credit check should not happen again, once Sale Order...
entry.content:
Standard SAP logic uses the confirmed quantity to determine the exposure, because that is what expected to be delivered. Even if you override LV_AMOUNT in BADI_SD_CM → FSCM_CREDIT_CHECK_ORDER, the framework still applies its own logic based on confirmed quantities unless you adjust the deeper determination routines.

What you can try is instead of only changing LV_AMOUNT, you need to adjust the credit check control logic in the BAdI so that the system considers ORDER_QUANTITY (from schedule lines) rather than CONFIRMED_QUANTITY. Key fields: XVBAP-BMENG (order quantity) vs. XVBEP-CMENG (confirmed quantity). Ensure you pass the recalculated value back to the credit check engine, not just override LV_AMOUNT locally, but I would not recommend to consider this custom development.  Better try to convince the client to go with standard functionality.

entry.title: Re: Moving Average Price is not getting updated
entry.content: Hello Team, I would like to inform you that we have not manually created any valuation type. Our materials are batch-enabled, so whenever we perform a GRN, the system automatically generates a batch. Correspondingly, the valuation type is created by the system

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hello!

I'm Giacomo, a developer from Germany. My SAP Journey is very recent. Even though I've been a software developer for 15 years, I just started my SAP journey at the beginning of 2025. I currently work as an AI-developer and I started evaluating the AI-features of SAP for our customers.

Since then I've learned about BTP, CAP, AI Core, Gen AI Hub, HANA Cloud, APL, PAL, and a bit of ABAP.

Looking forward to the exchange on this platform!

entry.title: Currency Mismatch in “Make Bank Transfer” App – House Bank Currency USD but System Showing GBP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a Bank Key (Region – GB) and a House Bank, with the bank location set to London and the bank account currency maintained as USD. The bank key region is also maintained as “GB.” For reference, the company code currency is IQD.

However, when we perform a bank-to-bank transfer using the “Make Bank Transfer” app, the system displays the currency as GBP instead of USD, which differs from the currency maintained during the bank master creation.

Could you please confirm whether this is standard system behavior, or if there is any configuration we might be missing?

Any guidance on this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

Rohini Dutta

 

Screenshot for reference

entry.title: Re: Event Mesh + AMQP: The Retry Trap Nobody Warns You About
entry.content:
Another question for what reason it is better to use JSM in case of Heavy iFlow logic?

How can the type of the queue have an impact on the processing of the iFlow?
Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Common Inventory Audit Challenges During Stock Taking
entry.content:
Below are the Best Practices to minimize discrepancies

1) Pre-audit preparation
Freeze movements in audited locations during counting. Clean up master data (storage bins, material statuses).

2) Structured counting process
Use counting teams with segregation of duties (one counts, another verifies). Provide clear instructions and training to counters.

3) Technology support
Use barcode scanners or mobile devices to reduce manual entry errors. Leverage SAP’s cycle counting for high-value or fast-moving items.

4) Handling special stock
Define procedures for damaged, obsolete, or consignment stock. Record stock in transit separately and reconcile after audit.

5) Post-count reconciliation
Investigate large variances immediately. Document reasons for differences (e.g., shrinkage, misplacement).

Some SAP-specific tips are

  • Use the Physical Inventory document in SAP MM to control and track counts.
  • Apply inventory sampling (if allowed by auditors) to reduce workload.
  • Leverage SAP reports (e.g., MI20 for differences, MI24 for list of inventory documents).
  • Use batch management to handle expired/damaged stock more accurately.
  • Consider cycle counting in SAP (transaction MICN) for continuous accuracy.

entry.title: cost element reassignment in ccs OKTZ. CCS split is not updated
entry.content:
Hi dear friends, 

I have a situation here., we are in actual costing scenario.

Basically,  some GL accounts (cost elements) are moved from cost component SemiFinish (CC A)  to cost component By-Product (CC B)

Account was changed in OKTZ. 

But the subsequent operations work still on CCS A. 

SAP note 
3012656 - How to change cost component structures in S/4 HANA

talks about cost component change, so replacing the CCS with something else altogether. I feel this is not my case. 

the mentioned reports /FCML4H_CCS_CHANGE and find nothing FCML4H_CCS_RESET. That is probably fair, because amount of cost components does not change. 

So.  Question please. What is the procedure to move a GL account from CC A to CC B? 

thank you.

Regards,
Laimonas

entry.title: Re: MR8M values different from invoice values
entry.content:
When you reverse an invoice with MR8M, the system recalculates values in both company code currency (local currency) and document currency (hard currency). It’s quite common to see differences if:

  • Exchange rates have changed between the original posting and the reversal.
  • The invoice had tax or conditions calculated differently at reversal time.
  • The system is using current exchange rate tables rather than the rate at the time of the original invoice.
  • Rounding differences occur between currencies.

In short, the mismatch is usually due to exchange rate or tax recalculation. The recommended approach is to analyze the currency settings and exchange rate usage, not to override with manual entries.

entry.title: Re: ABAP test cockpit (ATC) recommendations for governance of clean core ABAP development
entry.content:
Hello @OlgaDolinskaja ,

Can you explain if there is a way to get ATC On Prem 2025 checks into S4  On Prem 2023.

Thanks

entry.title: Personas script - Prevent users to reach Main Screen
entry.content:
HI all

I’m facing an issue with a Personas setup and I’m not sure how to solve it.

We have a direct URL for Personas that takes the user straight into a specific flavor and transaction code (/SCWM/RFUI). We are not using roles to launch this flavor, because our user base changes constantly. Instead, we simply provide the direct URL on the handheld device so we don’t need to maintain users in a specific role.

The problem is:
When the user presses Back (F7), they are taken to the main initial screen. We want to avoid this for two reasons:

  1. The URL should make the process extremely simple — users should only access this flavor and tcode, nothing else.
  2. When the user refreshes the URL after returning to the main screen, they receive an error. After that, the screen becomes completely stuck and the user needs to fully close the Chrome app and restart everything, which is a terrible experience.

I tried using the onFinalize event:

if (session.info.program === "SAPLSMTR_NAVIGATION") {
    session.utils.alert("Main screen");
}

During debugging, I noticed that all flavor-level events are triggered before the main screen is fully loaded, so this approach won’t work.I also considered creating a flavor for the main screen and redirecting back to /SCWM/RFUI, but that would require maintaining the user in /personas/admin, which we want to avoid.

Finally, I thought about intercepting the F7 key, but that would affect all other screens where F7 needs to behave normally as a Back function.

Does anyone have an idea on how to solve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Hello SAP community! My name is Mohammed Asif and i'm excited to start my journey.
entry.content:
Spoiler

 

 

Hello SAP Community!

My name is Mohammed Asif, and I’m currently pursuing Mechanical Engineering at REVA University in Bangalore, India.

I am very happy to be part of the Hello SAP Community initiative. This opportunity allows beginners like me to explore the SAP ecosystem and connect with professionals around the world.

As a student, I am interested in learning new technologies and understanding how SAP solutions help businesses manage their operations efficiently. Through the SAP Community, I hope to learn from experts, discover new ideas, and grow my professional network.

I look forward to sharing my learning journey and contributing to the  SAP  Community in the future.

Thank you SAP Community for this wonderful opportunity!

 

1.what is your professional life dream ?

My professional dream is to build a successful career in technology and engineering. I want to continuously learn new skills and work on innovative solutions that help organizations improve their efficiency. I also aim to contribute to the tech community and grow as a professional in the global technology ecosystem.

2.where do you see yourself in 5 years ?

In the next five years, I see myself as a skilled professional working in the technology industry. I hope to gain strong knowledge, practical experience, and work on real-world projects. I also want to keep learning and improving myself while contributing positively to my organization and community.

3.what is your hobby ?

One of my hobbies is learning about new technologies and exploring new ideas related to engineering and innovation. I also enjoy reading, learning new skills online, and improving my knowledge through different educational platforms.

4. which 5 thing do you absolutely want to achives in life ?

There are several goals I want to achieve in my life:

  • Build a successful professional career.
  • Continuously learn and develop new skills.
  • Contribute to society through knowledge and innovation.
  • Inspire others through my journey and experiences.

5.what is the best lesson your parents taught you ?

The best lesson my parents taught me is the importance of hard work, honesty, and patience. They always encouraged me to stay focused on my goals and never give up during difficult situations. These values continue to guide me in my education and future career.

#HelloSAPcommunity #SAPcommunity #SAPLearning #SAPForBeginners #TechCommunity #FutureWithSAP

entry.title: Керівну директорку SAP Ukraine номіновано до рейтингу «ТОП-50 лідерів українського бізнесу»
entry.content:
Друзі, маємо чудову новину для нашої SAP-спільноти!✨

Ганну Мікулицьку, керівну директорку SAP Ukraine, номіновано до рейтингу «ТОП-50 лідерів українського бізнесу» 2026 року 🙌
На сайті delo.ua триває голосування за найкращих керівників українських компаній. За його результатами експертне журі та редакція визначать тих, хто створює нову економіку країни.

У своїй роботі Ганна керується принципами, які сьогодні формують нову якість лідерства:
Прозорість і відповідальність, сміливість, а також людяність.
Як лідер, вона системно розвиває SAP-екосистему в Україні: сприяє цифровій трансформації бізнесу, розвиває партнерську мережу, активно підтримує державні ініціативи, спрямовані на розвиток IT-індустрії та зміцнення економіки країни.

Особливу увагу вона приділяє зростанню й розвитку локальної команди, створенню мотивуючого середовища, а також забезпеченню безпеки, добробуту та турботи про здоров’я співробітників.

Ганна не лише допомагає у трансформації бізнесу, а й підсилює голос України на глобальній арені.
Підтримайте Ганну своїм голосом💙💛
Голосування триває до 20 числа включно.

Проголосувати можна тут:
https://delo.ua/business/startuvalo-golosuvannya-reitingu-top-50-lideriv-ukrayinskogo-biznesu-2026-…

entry.title: SAP Meetup Barcelona, April 7th 2026
entry.content:
Hi everyone!
We’re happy to announce that the next SAP Meet-Up Barcelona will take place in person.

📅 Join us on Tuesday the 7th at 19:30
📍 Carrer de Mallorca 270, just a short walk from Passeig de Gràcia metro and train stations.

If you’d like to know more about the event, you can find all the details here:
https://community.sap.com/t5/barcelona-events/sap-meet-up-april-7th-2025/ec-p/14350394#M20

Looking forward to meeting many of you there! 😊
